sample_answers.answer:
The Date of Issue of the document in case CFI 057/2025 is February 2, 2026, as stated in the title page of the document. 

Supporting reasoning: This information is explicitly mentioned in the title page excerpt of the document. 

[Citation: [Doc: 1b446e196b4d1752241c8ff689a31ea705e98ad0c16b9d343c303664f72b64a1, Page: 1]]

No, cases SCT 295/2025 and SCT 514/2025 do not involve any of the same legal entities. 

In case SCT 295/2025, the claimant is Olexa and the defendant is Odon [Doc: 09660f78c26cd56c08c7253ed21ba01fb246092f482ccd8acd8e6f9b6fd2d917, Page: 1]. In case SCT 514/2025, the claimant is Okpara and the defendant is Oralee [Doc: 6306079a16b1dec85690f75c715cdbd78b0685a3e19ee30250d481bc32f2e29a, Page: 1]. Since the parties involved in both cases are different, there are no overlapping legal entities.
